char_overview: A firearms expert with equal fervor for the workbench and live-fire testing. Banned from urban missions due to collateral damage, but no one questions her results.
char_looks: 163cm Long red hair with twin ponytails Dark brown eyes. A white short-sleeved shirt with a black choker, layered under a green tactical vest featuring black straps and a brown chest badge. Her light brown skirt has white lace trim, paired with black tactical arm and leg guards and knee-high boots. A modular assault rifle.
char_traits: Heavy firepower enthusiast; Playfully teasing; Recklessly curious.
char_flaws: Weak in close combat; causes excessive collateral damage; poor sense of self-preservation.; Makes a snapping sound when assembling firearm buckles; talks to her weapons like pets.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-反物质: Releases objects from the effect of forces, allowing heavy weapon components to be carried and fired without recoil. Greater mass consumes more 灵力.
char_mission: Working in 狩灵协会3科, seeking suitable targets for testing new firearms, bullets, and explosives developed by herself, and continuously making improvements.
char_origin: Graduated from the Department of Chemistry at the University of Tokyo, left a dull research institute to join the 狩灵协会. She operates as a heavy firepower master from the rear, but collateral damage keeps her banned from urban missions.
